title: boerhavia diffusa f. acutifolia
intro: Boerhavia diffusa f. acutifolia, also known as the Red Sage or Redroot, is a perennial herb belonging to the Nyctaginaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Boerhavia diffusa f. acutifolia include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin problems, such as wounds and eczema. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
